nasb.text: It turned toward the east to Beth-dagon and reached to Zebulun, and to the valley of Iphtahel northward to Beth-emek and Neiel; then it proceeded on north to Cabul,

esv.text: then it turns eastward, it goes to Beth-dagon, and touches Zebulun and the Valley of Iphtahel northward to Beth-emek and Neiel. Then it continues in the north to Cabul,

cnv.text: 又轉往日出的方向，到伯．大袞，延伸到細步綸，向北去到伊弗他．伊勒谷、伯．以墨和尼業，又伸展到迦布勒的左邊，

ccb.text: 然后向东到伯·大衮与西布伦，北到伊弗他·伊勒谷，经伯·以墨和尼业直到迦步勒的北部；
